Key.English: Data module for perf monitoring, stats and persistence
Key.Chinesesimp: 用于性能监视、统计和持久性的数据模块
选择一个可用的数据库源

Key.English: Enter the name of the database
Only one Data module can be used
Key.Chinesesimp: 只能使用一个数据模块

Key.English: Enable/disable saving date and time of the mission
Key.Chinesesimp: 启用/禁用保存任务的日期和时间

Key.English: Enable/disable saving any compositions that are spawned for camps, checkpoints etc
Key.Chinesesimp: 启用/禁用保存为营地、检查点等生成的任何合成

Key.English: Enable kill feed in players group or side chat.
Key.Chinesesimp: 在玩家群组或阵营频道中启用击杀消息。

Key.English: Disable the recording of player/operation stats to the War Room
Key.Chinesesimp: 禁止记录作战室的玩家/操作数据

Key.English: Disable player tracking for AAR on War Room
Key.Chinesesimp: 在作战室中禁用AAR的玩家追踪功能

Key.English: Disable the recording of server performance data to War Room
Key.Chinesesimp: 禁止向作战室记录服务器性能数据

Key.English: Disable OS Performance Statistics such as %CPU, Threads, Memory Usage etc
Key.Chinesesimp: 禁用操作系统性能统计,如%CPU,线程,内存使用率等

Key.English: Customize objects counted and intervals. Ensure interval values are in ascending order. 'triggers' will count allMissionObjects "EmptyDetector", 'entities' will count entities "All", 'objects' will count allMissionObjects "All", 'activeScripts' will count all active scripts. Any thing else will be count YOURPARAM i.e. count allDead.
Key.Chinesesimp: 自定义对象计数和间隔。确保间隔值按升序排列。'triggers'将计算所有的missionobjects "EmptyDetector", 'entities'将计算实体"All", 'objects'将计算所有的missionobjects "All", 'activeScripts'将计算所有的活动脚本。其他的将被计算为YOURPARAM,也就是计算allDead。

Key.English: Wipe ALiVE persistence data (current mission or all data)
Key.Chinese: 清除ALiVE持久化資料(當前任務或全部資料)
Key.Chinesesimp: 清除ALiVE持久化数据(当前任务或全部数据)
Key.French: Effacer les données de persistance ALiVE (mission actuelle ou toutes les données)
Key.Spanish: Borrar datos de persistencia de ALiVE (misión actual o todos los datos)
Key.Portuguese: Apagar dados de persistência ALiVE (missão atual ou todos os dados)
Key.Russian: Удалить данные сохранения ALiVE (текущая миссия или все данные)

Key.French: Effacer les données de la mission actuelle
Key.Spanish: Borrar datos de la misión actual

Key.English: Removes only the current mission's saved ALiVE data. Cannot be undone.
Key.Chinese: 僅刪除當前任務的ALiVE存檔資料。無法撤銷。
Key.Chinesesimp: 仅删除当前任务的ALiVE存档数据。无法撤销。
Key.French: Supprime uniquement les données sauvegardées d'ALiVE pour la mission actuelle. Action irréversible.
Key.Spanish: Elimina solo los datos guardados de ALiVE de la misión actual. No se puede deshacer.
Key.Portuguese: Remove apenas os dados salvos do ALiVE da missão atual. Não pode ser desfeito.
Key.Russian: Удаляет только сохранённые данные ALiVE текущей миссии. Отменить невозможно.

Key.Spanish: Borrar TODOS los datos de ALiVE

Key.English: Removes all saved ALiVE data for every mission. Cannot be undone.
Key.Chinese: 刪除所有任務的全部ALiVE存檔資料。無法撤銷。
Key.Chinesesimp: 删除所有任务的全部ALiVE存档数据。无法撤销。
Key.French: Supprime toutes les données sauvegardées d'ALiVE pour toutes les missions. Action irréversible.
Key.Spanish: Elimina todos los datos guardados de ALiVE de todas las misiones. No se puede deshacer.
Key.Portuguese: Remove todos os dados salvos do ALiVE de todas as missões. Não pode ser desfeito.
Key.Russian: Удаляет все сохранённые данные ALiVE для всех миссий. Отменить невозможно.

Key.French: Confirmer: effacer les données de mission
Key.Spanish: Confirmar: borrar datos de la misión

Key.Chinese: 是的,清除該任務的資料
Key.Chinesesimp: 是的,清除该任务的数据
Key.French: Oui, effacer les données de cette mission
Key.Spanish: Sí, borrar los datos de esta misión
Key.Portuguese: Sim, apagar os dados desta missão

Key.English: Permanently clears the current mission's saved data. Cannot be undone.
Key.Chinese: 永久清除當前任務的存檔資料。無法撤銷。
Key.Chinesesimp: 永久清除当前任务的存档数据。无法撤销。
Key.French: Efface définitivement les données sauvegardées de la mission actuelle. Action irréversible.
Key.Spanish: Borra permanentemente los datos guardados de la misión actual. No se puede deshacer.
Key.Portuguese: Apaga permanentemente os dados salvos da missão atual. Não pode ser desfeito.
Key.Russian: Безвозвратно очищает сохранённые данные текущей миссии. Отменить невозможно.

Key.French: Oui, effacer TOUTES les données ALiVE
Key.Spanish: Sí, borrar TODOS los datos de ALiVE
Key.Portuguese: Sim, apagar TODOS os dados ALiVE

Key.English: Permanently wipes all ALiVE saved data across every mission. Cannot be undone.
Key.Chinese: 永久清除所有任務的全部ALiVE存檔資料。無法撤銷。
Key.Chinesesimp: 永久清除所有任务的全部ALiVE存档数据。无法撤销。
Key.French: Efface définitivement toutes les données sauvegardées d'ALiVE pour toutes les missions. Action irréversible.
Key.Spanish: Borra permanentemente todos los datos guardados de ALiVE de todas las misiones. No se puede deshacer.
Key.Portuguese: Apaga permanentemente todos os dados salvos do ALiVE em todas as missões. Não pode ser desfeito.
Key.Russian: Безвозвратно удаляет все сохранённые данные ALiVE во всех миссиях. Отменить невозможно.

Key.English: Return to the previous menu without wiping anything
Key.Chinese: 返回上一級選單,不清除任何內容
Key.Chinesesimp: 返回上一级菜单,不清除任何内容
Key.French: Revenir au menu précédent sans rien effacer
Key.Spanish: Volver al menú anterior sin borrar nada
Key.Portuguese: Voltar ao menu anterior sem apagar nada
Key.Russian: Вернуться в предыдущее меню без удаления данных

Key.French: ALiVE: données de la mission actuelle effacées
Key.Spanish: ALiVE: datos de la misión actual eliminados
Key.Portuguese: ALiVE: dados da missão atual apagados

Key.French: ALiVE: toutes les données ALiVE effacées
Key.Spanish: ALiVE: todos los datos de ALiVE eliminados
Key.Portuguese: ALiVE: todos os dados ALiVE apagados
